title: Vanilla Scoop
description: A modpack, with an extra scoop of visual and quality of life goodness.
body:
This mod pack combines the highly-rated fabric visual and performance mods such as **Sodium**, **Iris**, **Lithium**, and **Indium** with many quality-of-life tweaks!

**⚠ While all the installed mods support 1.19, some are experimental and may cause crashes. These will be replaced with stable versions when they become available.**

# Installation
Simply the [modrinth documentation](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/), this modpack has been tested on ATLauncher and MultiMC/PolyMC

## External Downloads & Licenses

**External Downloads**

The following mods have been downloaded externally from **CurseForge**

- [Illuminations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations) - Adds fireflies and various glow-in-the-dark ambient particles
- [Xaeros Mini Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) - Adds a mini map
- [Xaeros World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a world map
- [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective) - Adds visual and auditory effects lacking in Vanilla Minecraft
- [Cycle Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cycle-paintings-fabric) - Lets you cycle placed paintings

**Licencing**

The mod pack works without these mods, but they improve the quality of life. If you wish to include them you'll have to download them externally from **CurseForge**

- [Don't Clear Chat History](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dont-clear-chat-history)
- [Enchanting Commands (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanting-commands-fabric)
- [Farsight (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight-fabric)
- [GUI Followers (Fabric)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gui-followers-fabric/)
